Are the eyes unnaturally shaped or asymmetrical? Answer Yes or No.
Do the pupils or irises appear misaligned with the gaze direction? Answer Yes or No.
Is there inconsistent blinking or unusually long gaps between blinks? Answer Yes or No.
Does the mouth movement look out of sync with the expression? Answer Yes or No.
Are the teeth or inner mouth textures unnaturally smooth or blurred? Answer Yes or No.
Is the skin texture inconsistent across regions (overly smooth vs. detailed)? Answer Yes or No.
Do facial boundaries (jawline, hairline, ears) show warping or blending artifacts? Answer Yes or No.
Are there flickering artifacts around the cheeks or forehead? Answer Yes or No.
Is the lighting or shadow direction on the face inconsistent with the background? Answer Yes or No.
Are specular highlights on the skin or eyes unnatural or misplaced? Answer Yes or No.
Do the eyebrows or eyelashes look pasted, incomplete, or misaligned? Answer Yes or No.
Is the hair boundary (especially flyaway hairs) blurred or abruptly cut? Answer Yes or No.
Do reflections in glasses or eyes look unrealistic or inconsistent? Answer Yes or No.
Is there color banding or compression-like artifacts concentrated on the face? Answer Yes or No.
Does the nose region (bridge, nostrils) appear distorted or unstable across the frame? Answer Yes or No.
Is the neck or chin boundary mismatched with the face (tone, texture, alignment)? Answer Yes or No.
Are ear shapes, earrings, or contours inconsistent or deformed? Answer Yes or No.
Is facial symmetry unusually perfect or irregular compared to natural faces? Answer Yes or No.
Does the background near the face warp or ripple unnaturally? Answer Yes or No.
Are skin tones across face and neck inconsistent in hue or saturation? Answer Yes or No.
